name: Bogracs Gulyas (Kettle Goulash)
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Stewing beef; cut into 1-inch cubes
1 container Sour cream; at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Heat the fat in a deep, heavy pot.
3. Cook the onions, peppers, and garlic until the onions are limp and transparent.
4. Add paprika when it has lost its raw taste.
5. Add beef and remaining ingredients except sour cream. Stir well to combine.
6. Simmer in the preheated oven for 1 and 1/2 to 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
7. Adjust oven temperature during cooking time so that contents of the pot remain at a simmer.
8. Serve in shallow soup bowls with a tablespoon of sour cream atop each serving.
